title: derris lasiantha
intro: Derris lasiantha, also known as Derris or Kasinga, is a plant species native to tropical regions of Asia and Australia, belonging to the family Leguminosae. The plant has been traditionally used in medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and analgesic properties. The health benefits of Derris lasiantha include reducing fever, relieving pain, and treating skin infections, making it a popular remedy in traditional medicine. In herbal preparations, Derris lasiantha is often used in the form of decoctions, infusions, and ointments, allowing its medicinal properties to be harnessed for various therapeutic purposes.
